description.content: Obtain and manage authentication tokens
Authenticate using OAuth 2.0 client credentials to obtain a bearer token for accessing the Checkmarx SCA API.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
(Required) OAuth 2.0 grant type
(Required) SCA account username
(Required) SCA account password
(Required) Tenant identifier
(Required) API access scope
OAuth client ID

REST API for Checkmarx Software Composition Analysis (SCA), enabling programmatic management of open source security scanning, vulnerability detection, license compliance analysis, and dependency inventory for software projects.
